title: Modern Recipe Infographic Food Layout AI
sourceTitle: Modern Recipe Infographic Food Layout AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-clean modern recipe infographic for chow mein, with the finished dish as the hero visual. Subject: chow mein appears plated and slightly elevated as the central hero food image, surrounded by noodles, cabbage, carrot, scallion, soy sauce, garlic, sesame oil, egg, and chili flakes, slice vegetables, boil noodles, stir-fry garlic, add noodles and sauce, toss until glossy, garnish and serve, and 420 calories, 10 min prep, 12 min cook, 2 servings, medium spice. Scene: Editorial square food infographic layout on a minimal textured or gradient background with ingredients, preparation steps, tips, and cooking icons arranged around the dish. Composition: Fixed 1080x1080 square layout: hero dish centered or slightly elevated, ingredients in clusters or circular flow, numbered step panels connected with arrows, and clean badges for optional info. Signature Elements: Preserved modern recipe infographic food layout source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Editorial infographic meets lifestyle food photography, vibrant natural food color, subtle drop shadows, clean vector icons, modern typography, soft gradients or glassmorphism panels, and polished social-recipe clarity. Color Palette: Fixed fresh food color, warm neutral background, small accent colors on key stats, clean white panels, and natural appetizing contrast. Lighting: Soft natural studio light on the dish, gentle shadows under plates and panels, crisp icon readability, and appetizing food highlights. Typography: chow mein, ingredient quantities, numbered cooking steps, and 420 calories, 10 min prep, 12 min cook, 2 servings, medium spice must be clean, modern, readable, and not overcrowded. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
